intended_use: Research-use continuously age-adjusted anatomical rarity screening; not a refractive prediction model.
selection_rule: Use Extended when both WTW and CCT are valid; otherwise use Core.

models.cohort_status: Single-center continuously age-adjusted institutional reference; clinical indication is not verified by EMR.

AL.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

Mean_K.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

ACD.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

LT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

models.covariance_method: Reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue
models.calibration_method: Patient-held-out age-local empirical calibration; one deterministic eye per patient; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 8 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing
models.threshold_interpretation: Prespecified descriptive categories, not clinical decision thresholds.

models.covariance_method: Reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue
models.calibration_method: Patient-held-out age-local empirical calibration; one deterministic eye per patient; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 4 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing
